articles.description: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ramen has released Aura 15.0, the latest update for its best-in-class multi-agent AI assistant supporting both Unreal and Unity game development. This update follows just a week after the launch of v14.0, which included Unreal Engine 5.8 support, up to 2X speed and accuracy improvements and a groundbreaking custom-trained Python agent.
